message:
test(integration): expand resize scheduler integration tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

- resize_scheduler_input_guardrail_integration.rs: 5 new tests covering
  minimum budget floor, budget-of-one edge case, multi-pane under
  pressure, deferred aging + starvation recovery, metric accumulation
- resize_scheduler_remote_domain_integration.rs: 5 new tests covering
  multi-SSH domain fair partitioning, local-vs-remote budget share
  weighting, storm tab rotation, mux endpoint independence, and
  domain budget disabled mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
